Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v22: Fix black screen caused by 401 cloud load corrupting game state

cloudLoad\(\) was not checking res.ok before parsing JSON. A 401 response
from an expired token could return data that deserializeState\(\) would
process, corrupting the game state and hiding the class-select overlay
while leaving a black canvas.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v22: Fix script cache mismatch and stale auth causing black screen

- Fixed index.html script tags that were still at ?v=20 while modules
  were at ?v=22, causing import mismatch on Railway
- cloudLoad\(\) now clears auth on 401 so stale tokens don''t persist
- Init flow now shows login overlay when token is invalidated instead
  of leaving user stuck on black screen

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v23: Add save validation to prevent corrupted saves causing black screen

- Added isValidSave\(\) that checks for required fields \(map, player, mapW, mapH, phase\)
- deserializeState\(\) now rejects invalid save data
- loadGame\(\) deletes corrupted saves from localStorage on failure
- hasSaveGame\(\) validates save before showing Continue button

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''

main.js was importing engine/renderer/constants with ?v=19 while all
other modules used ?v=23, and index.html loaded main.js?v=22. Browser
treated these as separate modules with isolated state objects.

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v25: Add 5-tier items, 6 subclasses, and expanded skill trees

Three major features:

1. 5-Tier Item Rarity System
   - Common \(gray\) > Uncommon \(green\) > Rare \(blue\) > Epic \(purple\) > Legendary \(orange\)
   - 8 new Epic items and 6 new Legendary items with unique features
   - Legendary items only drop from bosses on floor 7+
   - New item features: stun_chance, dodge_bonus, mana_regen, double_strike

2. 6 Subclass Specializations \(unlocked at level 5\)
   - Warrior: Berserker \(rage/damage\) or Paladin \(healing/defense\)
   - Mage: Pyromancer \(fire/AoE\) or Necromancer \(shadow/drain\)
   - Archer: Ranger \(nature/traps\) or Assassin \(stealth/crit\)
   - Each subclass grants stat bonuses and unlocks 2 new skill branches

3. Expanded Skill Trees \(4 branches per class, ~20 skills each\)
   - 2 base branches expanded from 3 to 5 skills
   - 2 subclass branches with 5 skills each \(locked until level 5\)
   - 20+ new active skills: devastating_blow, frenzy, holy_light,
     fireball, life_drain, shadow_step, death_lotus, and more
   - 2-column grid layout for skill tree UI

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v26: Town upgrades, run history, boss phases, portal scrolls, stack increase, mobile responsive

Six features:

1. Town Upgrades — Healer, Shop, Blacksmith, Arena each have 3 upgrade
   levels purchasable with gold. Effects include cheaper heals, shop
   discounts, epic/legendary recipes, arena XP and bonus items. Upgrades
   persist across runs and prestige.

2. Run History — Press L to view a journal of past runs showing class,
   floor reached, cause of death, kills, gold earned, and more. Stores
   up to 50 entries, persists across resets.

3. Boss Phases — Multi-phase bosses on floors 10 \(Demon Lord\), 20
   \(Ancient Dragon\), and 30 \(Void Emperor\). Phase transitions at 66%
   and 33% HP with healing, stat boosts, new abilities, and summons.

4. Town Portal Scrolls — Consumable scroll \(buyable at shop or found as
   loot\) that teleports from dungeon back to town, preserving floor
   progress for return.

5. Stack Increase — Potions and ingredients now stack to 30 \(was 20\).

6. Mobile Responsive — CSS media queries for 768px and 480px breakpoints
   with flex-column layout, hidden controls panel, and auto-sized canvas.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Start Over option in Settings to fully reset all game progress

Settings > Danger Zone now has a "Start Over" button with confirmation
that wipes all saves, achievements, prestige, town upgrades, run history,
bestiary, armory, and stats — returning the player to a fresh class
selection screen.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

EOF

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Guarantee path to stairs via BFS check and add up stairs to go back floors

Two changes:

1. Path guarantee — After dungeon decoration, a BFS flood-fill checks
   that the player start can reach the down stairs. If decoration
   blocked the path, a direct corridor is carved as a fallback.

2. Up stairs — On floor 2+, an UP_STAIRS tile spawns next to the player
   start position. Stepping on it returns to the previous floor \(or to
   the village on floor 1\). Items won''t drop on up stairs tiles.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Portal scroll preserves dungeon state; fully responsive mobile layout

Two features:

1. Portal scroll state preservation — Using a portal scroll \(or town
   portal skill, or stepping on a dungeon portal\) now saves a full
   snapshot of the dungeon: map, enemies, items, chests, player position,
   FOV, and turn count. Stepping on the return portal in town restores
   the exact dungeon state instead of generating a new one. The snapshot
   is cleared on death, restart, or entering a new floor normally.

2. Fully responsive mobile layout — Added virtual D-pad and action
   buttons \(Pick, Shoot, Spell, Map, Char, Menu\) that appear on touch
   devices and screens ≤768px. Four responsive breakpoints: 768px
   \(tablet\), 480px \(phone\), 360px \(small phone\). Prevents iOS
   double-tap zoom. Canvas auto-sizes, panels wrap/stack, overlays
   scroll, controls hidden on mobile.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v27: Add guardians, monster dens, and mimics

Three new monster features:

1. Monster Treasure Guardians — Rare guardian chambers on floors 3+
   with powerful named monsters \(e.g. "Grethmaw the Hoarder"\) that
   only attack when the player enters their room. 8x gold reward,
   3x loot multiplier, guaranteed guardian relic drop.

2. Monster Breeding Dens — 1-2 destructible structures per floor on
   floors 2+ that spawn a themed enemy every 5 turns \(max 6 spawns\).
   Six den types matching floor themes. Bump-attack to destroy, drops
   den core material and grants XP.

3. Mimics — 15% of chests on floors 2+ are secretly monsters. Three
   tiers by depth: Mimic, Greater Mimic, Ancient Mimic. Look identical
   to normal chests until the player tries to open them.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/orentzezana/Desktop/my-test-rpg-dungeon commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v28: Monster faction infighting, 4 new environments, backpack overhaul

Three major features:

1. Monster Faction System & Infighting
   - 10 factions \(Goblinoid, Undead, Beast, Nature, Fire, Ice, Construct,
     Arcane, Dragon, Aberration\) with 6 hostile faction pairs
   - Enemies within 3 tiles of a hostile rival fight each other
   - Priority: player adjacent > rival adjacent > closer target
   - Bosses/guardians never infight; no player rewards for enemy kills
   - Amber-colored combat log for faction fights

2. 4 New Environment Types
   - Goblin Village \(floors 1-4\): outdoor settlement with palisade,
     huts, campfires, and packed dirt paths
   - Dragon''s Lair \(floors 5-99\): massive central cavern with charred
     rock, side caves, and treasure hoard area
   - Swamp Bog \(floors 2-5\): murky wetland with eroded rooms, water
     tiles, and dead tree stumps
   - Shadow Realm \(floors 7-99\): dark void dimension with purple
     obsidian and arcane runes
   - 8 new tile types with procedural sprites
   - New entity: Kobold \(Dragon faction minion\)

3. Backpack Overhaul
   - Size increased 4x \(30 -> 120 slots\)
   - Tab system: All / Gear / Potions / Ingr. / Others
   - Scrollable inventory grid
   - 9 unique ingredient/material sprites \(bone fragment, spider silk,
     iron ore, dark essence, dragon scale, crystal shard, den core,
     guardian relic, portal scroll\)
   - Material items get golden border color

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
